chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3095 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.13205/2020. 2. For hearing of main case. 13.02.2025 Qazi Ali Qamar, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Per learned counsel, petition has become infructuous, hence, may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
